title: Open Cloze: The Story of Chocolate

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: The story of chocolate stretches back over three thousand years to the ancient civilisations of Central America. The Maya were among the first people to cultivate cocoa trees, and they used the beans to prepare a bitter, spicy _________ (1.1) that bore little resemblance to modern hot chocolate. Cocoa held such great _________ (1.2) in Aztec society that the beans were even used as a form of currency. When the Spanish conquistadors arrived in the 16th century, they were initially put _________ (1.3) by the drink's bitter taste, but they soon learned to sweeten it _________ (1.4) adding sugar and vanilla. It was not _________ (1.5) the mid-17th century that chocolate drinking spread across Europe, largely thanks to trade routes _________ (1.6) connected the New World with major European ports. For a long time, chocolate remained a luxury that _________ (1.7) the wealthy could afford. The real turning _________ (1.8) came in 1828, when a Dutch chemist invented a press that separated cocoa butter from the roasted beans. This breakthrough paved the _________ (1.9) for the creation of solid chocolate bars, which quickly gained popularity. Today, the global chocolate industry is _________ (1.10) billions of dollars annually, yet most of the world's cocoa is still grown in West Africa under conditions that raise serious ethical concerns.
